title.rendered: AMI Completes NVIDIA Qualified Program Software and System Test Suite for MegaRAC SP-X on NVIDIA MGX with Grace and Grace Hopper Superchip-Based Server Platforms

content.rendered:
ATLANTA, GEORGIA – AMI®, the global leader in Dynamic Firmware for worldwide computing, is pleased to announce it has achieved compliance with the NVIDIA Qualified Software and System Test Suite using the NVIDIA System Software Validation Toolkit (NVSSVT) and NVIDIA RAS (NVRAS) Tool for its MegaRAC® SP-X manageability solution on NVIDIA MGX with NVIDIA Grace– and NVIDIA GH200 Grace Hopper Superchip-based platforms.

AMI’s industry-leading MegaRAC SP-X server management solution offers powerful remote management capabilities for server platforms. Its seamless performance and reliability help consistently ensure the stability, safety, and security of managed servers. NVSSVT and NVRAS Tool provide a unified way to test the system and RAS features of select NVIDIA hardware. It runs on a separate machine from the computer that is being tested, remotely executes the tests automatically, and gathers the logs for analysis. NVRAS Tool helps ensure system behavior is understood and predictable when errors occur on a platform.

AMI continues to deploy its global resources to support CSPs/OEMs/ODMs worldwide, powering server platforms featuring NVIDIA  MGX with Grace and Grace Hopper Superchips that are designed for high-performance computing (HPC) and AI applications.

“Today’s announcement is another clear sign of AMI’s commitment and leadership in meeting the high serviceability demands of HPC and AI applications, leveraging the performance and versatility of NVIDIA MGX with Grace and Grace Hopper Superchips,” commented Anurag Bhatia, SVP – Global Manageability Solutions Group at AMI.

Follow AMI on LinkedIn and X/Twitter to receive the latest news and announcements.

AMI® and MegaRAC® are registered trademarks of AMI in the US and/or elsewhere. All other trademarks and registered trademarks are the property of their respective owners.
